raw_consumer_statement:
I paid in advance to the XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, XXXX for myself and my husband as advised to do on their website, prior to the immigration appointment. Once we arrived, we were advised that they could not provide a visa within the travel period that we needed so we never completed the process to receive the visa and requested a refund for {$320.00} ( {$160.00} x XXXX ). 

While I have email confirmation from the immigration agency that they would provide me refund, Citi refused to refund us the money. I provided the email chain to Citi showing proof that I was deserved a refund, but they still refused to process it. 

The purchase was made on XX/XX/year>.
